records.display_name: Hylan Boulevard Transportation Improvement Study

description: Study to develop a comprehensive improvement plan for Hylan Boulevard including intersection improvements, Select Bus Service, traffic flow improvements, and safety enhancements. Target implementation 2013.
Study of proposed improvements along Hylan Boulevard and Richmond Avenue in Staten Island, including bus lane, TSP, SBS stations, and pedestrian/roadway enhancements

Transportation improvement study for the Hylan Boulevard corridor on Staten Island, covering traffic congestion, transit commute times, safety improvements, and bus service improvements including Select Bus Service.
Transportation improvement study along the Hylan Boulevard/Richmond Avenue corridor, evaluating traffic, bus service, safety, and potential Select Bus Service options
Study of Hylan Boulevard corridor in Staten Island to improve traffic flow, reduce bus travel time, improve transit access, and improve safety
Study of transportation improvements along Hylan Boulevard, including S79 Select Bus Service improvements
